summary: KYN (Know Your Neighbor) - A free speech social media app where users can upload and share information about their community and neighbors
architectural_notes: Social media platform architecture with user-generated content
Free speech platform requiring content moderation considerations

existing_features.title: Implement user authentication system using Internet Identity that allows users to register and log in to the platform
Create a post creation interface that allows authenticated users to upload and share information about their community and neighbors with text content
Build a community feed interface that displays all user-submitted posts in chronological order with most recent posts first
Create user profile pages that display individual user information and their posted content
Establish a cohesive visual design theme for the KYN platform with a neighborhood-focused aesthetic using warm, community-oriented colors and clean typography that reflects trust and openness
Add location selection functionality to the user registration and profile editing flows in the frontend
Create a moderation interface in the frontend that allows moderators to review posts and approve or remove them
Filter the community feed to only display posts that have been approved by moderators
Display user location information on user profile pages

new_feature_requests.summary: Post creation and upload functionality for community information
Extend the user profile data model in the backend to include a location field that stores the user's selected location
Add a moderation status field to posts in the backend that tracks whether posts are pending review, approved, or removed
Implement backend authorization logic that designates certain users as moderators with permission to approve or remove posts
